zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，关注关键支撑
zh.content:
XRP/USD最新报1.09073，24小时微涨0.34%，但价格仍运行于20周期均线1.095115下方，显示短期反弹力度有限。从结构来看，市场处于震荡偏弱格局，多头虽尝试修复跌势，但尚未形成明确上升趋势。

技术指标方面，MACD值为-0.010882470，处于零轴下方，反映空头动能仍占据一定优势。由于RSI数据暂缺，难以判断超买或超卖状态，但均线压制与MACD弱势共振，意味着短线仍需警惕回调风险。

支撑阻力方面，短期支撑关注1.0867附近低点区域，若失守可能进一步测试1.0800整数关口。上方首要阻力位于SMA20所在的1.0951附近，突破后有望挑战1.1000至1.1050区域，多空或将在该区间展开争夺。

交易策略上，稳健型投资者可等待价格重新站稳1.0951并伴随成交量放大后再考虑顺势做多；激进型投资者则可关注1.0867支撑附近的短线反弹机会，但需严格设置止损。整体而言，当前宜以区间交易和风险控制为主，避免盲目追涨。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading at 1.09073, holding slightly above the session low of 1.08672 and posting a modest 0.34% daily gain. Price action remains cautious, with the market trading below the 20-period simple moving average at 1.095115. This positioning suggests that short-term momentum is still tilted to the downside despite recent stabilization. The narrow trading range also reflects a period of consolidation, with traders waiting for a stronger directional catalyst.

The moving average structure indicates that buyers have not yet regained full control. A sustained move above 1.0951 would improve the near-term outlook and could encourage a test of higher resistance zones. Meanwhile, the MACD reading of -0.01088 points to lingering bearish momentum, although the absence of a signal-line value limits confirmation of trend strength. The lack of an available RSI reading also means momentum conditions should be assessed primarily through price behavior and moving-average positioning.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 1.0867, the recent session low. A break below this area could expose additional downside toward the 1.0800 region, where buyers may attempt to re-enter. On the upside, resistance is visible near the SMA(20) at 1.0951, followed by the psychologically important 1.1000 level. A decisive breakout above these barriers would strengthen bullish sentiment and potentially trigger momentum-driven buying.

For trading purposes, conservative participants may prefer to wait for confirmation above 1.0951 before considering long positions, as this would indicate improving trend conditions. More aggressive traders could monitor pullbacks toward support for short-term opportunities while maintaining disciplined risk management. Conversely, failure to hold above 1.0867 would favor a defensive stance and could support short-biased strategies until stronger evidence of trend reversal emerges.
